message:
feat(conformance): expand differential test corpus with additional edge cases and workflow tests

Extend the conformance framework with new differential test entries
covering reduction corner cases, broadcasting edge scenarios, and
workflow-level validation paths. Restructure existing test groupings
for better coverage tracking.

- Add new differential corpus entries for reduction, broadcast, and
  ufunc edge cases
- Reorganize test registration for clearer category boundaries
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
